get.description: Generate Spotify OAuth authorization URL with CSRF state and PKCE.

schema.title: Response Get Spotify Auth Url Api V1 Connectors Spotify Auth Url Get

get.description:
Generate Last.fm web auth URL.

Derives the callback URL from the request's Host header so it works
for both localhost development and production deployment. Embeds a
``_state`` query param in the callback URL since Last.fm has no native
state parameter.

schema.title: Response Get Lastfm Auth Url Api V1 Connectors Lastfm Auth Url Get

get.description:
Spotify OAuth callback — exchanges code for tokens, stores them.

On success, redirects to /settings/integrations?auth=spotify&status=success.
On failure, redirects to /settings/integrations?auth=spotify&status=error.

Last.fm auth callback — exchanges token for permanent session key.

Last.fm's web auth flow:
1. User authorized on last.fm, redirected here with ?token=TOKEN&_state=STATE
2. We validate the state to recover user_id
3. We call auth.getSession to exchange the token for a permanent session key
4. Session key stored in database, user redirected to /settings

post.description: Receive and process Neon Auth webhook events.

get.description: Health check with database connectivity probe.
Get aggregate statistics for the dashboard.
Run data integrity checks and return the report.
Get match method health statistics.
List all playlists with pagination.

post.description: Create a new empty playlist.

get.description: Get a playlist by ID with all entries.
Get paginated track entries for a playlist.
List all connector links for a playlist.

schema.title: Response List Playlist Links Api V1 Playlists  Playlist Id  Links Get

post.description:
Link a playlist to an external service playlist.

Accepts Spotify URLs, URIs, or raw IDs. Validates that the external
playlist exists before creating the link.

delete.description: Unlink a playlist from an external service.

patch.description: Update a playlist link's sync direction.

get.description: Preview what a sync would change without executing it.

post.description:
Start a sync operation for a playlist link.

Returns immediately with an operation_id. Progress streams via
GET /operations/{operation_id}/progress (existing SSE endpoint).

Create an assignment and apply it to the playlist's tracks.

Create and apply share one session to halve connection churn. The create
leg commits first; if the apply leg errors, the assignment persists and
can be retried via ``POST /{id}/apply``.
Re-run the engine for a single existing assignment.

delete.description: Remove an assignment. Already-applied tags/preferences are preserved.

get.description:
List tracks with optional search, filters, sorting, and pagination.

Supports both offset-based and cursor-based (keyset) pagination.
When ``cursor`` is provided, it takes precedence over ``offset`` for
O(1) page seeking regardless of depth.

parameters.name: tag

schema.description: Filter by tag (repeat for multi-tag). Normalized server-side.
schema.title: Tag

parameters.description: Filter by tag (repeat for multi-tag). Normalized server-side.

parameters.name: tag_mode

schema.description: Intersection (and) or union (or) when tag has multiple values.
schema.title: Tag Mode

parameters.description: Intersection (and) or union (or) when tag has multiple values.

parameters.name: namespace

schema.description: Filter to tracks carrying any mood:*/energy:* tag.
schema.title: Namespace

parameters.description: Filter to tracks carrying any mood:*/energy:* tag.

get.description: Get full track details with metadata, likes, plays, and playlist memberships.

post.description: Merge a duplicate track into this track (winner).

patch.description: Relink a connector mapping to a different canonical track.

delete.description: Unlink a connector mapping from this track.

patch.description: Set a mapping as the primary for its connector on this track.

get.description: Get playlists containing a specific track.

schema.title: Response Get Track Playlists Api V1 Tracks  Track Id  Playlists Get

put.description: Set a preference on a track. Source is always 'manual'.

delete.description: Remove a preference from a track. Idempotent — 204 even if none existed.

post.description:
Add a tag to a track. Source is always 'manual'.

Re-tagging an already-tagged track returns 201 with ``changed=false``
— the response tells the client whether a new row actually inserted.

delete.description:
Remove a tag from a track. Idempotent — 204 even if the tag wasn't present.

Path segments are URL-decoded by FastAPI before arriving here; the use
case normalizes the value (lowercase/strip/etc.) so clients that send
``Mood%3AChill`` still match the stored ``mood:chill``.

post.description:
Apply one tag to many tracks atomically.

Batches are capped at 15,000 track_ids (enforced by the request
schema's ``max_length``). An invalid tag rejects the whole batch —
Pydantic surfaces the ValueError from ``normalize_tag`` as a 422
before the use case runs, so the user never ends up with half-tagged
tracks.

get.description:
List a user's tags with usage counts, sorted by count desc.

When ``q`` is set, results filter via the GIN trigram index on ``tag``
for sub-millisecond lookups — powers the tag autocomplete in the UI.

schema.title: Response List Tags Api V1 Tags Get

get.description:
List the user's Spotify playlists for the browser dialog.

Cache-first: reads from ``connector_playlists`` unless ``force_refresh``
is true. Per-playlist ``import_status`` reflects whether this user has
already linked the Spotify playlist into Mixd.

parameters.name: force_refresh

schema.description: Bypass the DBConnectorPlaylist cache and re-fetch from Spotify
schema.title: Force Refresh

parameters.description: Bypass the DBConnectorPlaylist cache and re-fetch from Spotify

post.description:
Import a batch of Spotify playlists with a chosen sync direction.

Non-atomic: one failing playlist doesn't abort the others. Each
successful import creates a canonical ``Playlist`` + ``PlaylistLink``;
previously-imported playlists with a known snapshot are short-circuited
into ``skipped_unchanged``.
Trigger a Last.fm listening history import.
Trigger a Spotify liked tracks import.
Trigger a Last.fm likes export (love tracks on Last.fm).
Import Spotify listening history from a GDPR data export JSON file.

get.description: Get sync checkpoint status for all known service/entity combinations.

schema.title: Response Get Checkpoints Api V1 Imports Checkpoints Get

get.description:
Stream real-time progress for an operation via Server-Sent Events.

Uses FastAPI's built-in EventSourceResponse encoding which provides:
- Automatic 15s keep-alive pings (prevents proxy timeouts)
- Cache-Control: no-cache and X-Accel-Buffering: no headers
- Proper SSE wire-format encoding including multi-line data handling
List all active operation IDs.

schema.title: Response List Active Operations Api V1 Operations Get

ActiveAssignmentSchema.title: ActiveAssignmentSchema
ActiveAssignmentSchema.description: One active assignment on a Spotify playlist row.

AssignmentSchema.title: AssignmentSchema
AssignmentSchema.description: One PlaylistAssignment row, serialized for the wire.

CheckpointStatusSchema.title: CheckpointStatusSchema
CheckpointStatusSchema.description: Sync checkpoint status for a single service + entity type.

ConnectorLinkBriefSchema.title: ConnectorLinkBriefSchema
ConnectorLinkBriefSchema.description: Compact link info for playlist list views.

ConnectorMappingSchema.title: ConnectorMappingSchema
ConnectorMappingSchema.description: Connector mapping for track detail views with full provenance.

ConnectorStatusSchema.title: ConnectorStatusSchema
ConnectorStatusSchema.description: Current authentication status of a music service connector.

CreateAssignmentRequest.title: CreateAssignmentRequest
CreateAssignmentRequest.description:
Body for POST /api/v1/playlist-assignments.

``action_value`` is canonicalized server-side via the same domain
``validate_action_value`` that the CLI helper uses — invalid input
fails fast with 422 before the use case touches the DB.

CreateAssignmentResponse.title: CreateAssignmentResponse
CreateAssignmentResponse.description:
Response for POST /api/v1/playlist-assignments.

Bundles the newly-created assignment AND the engine result from the
immediate apply, so the Web UI can render the success toast with real
counts (``"412 tracks tagged mood:chill"``) without a follow-up call.

ExportLastfmLikesRequest.title: ExportLastfmLikesRequest
ExportLastfmLikesRequest.description: Request body for triggering a Last.fm likes export.

ImportFailureSchema.title: ImportFailureSchema
ImportFailureSchema.description: One playlist that errored during import.

ImportLastfmHistoryRequest.title: ImportLastfmHistoryRequest
ImportLastfmHistoryRequest.description: Request body for triggering a Last.fm history import.

ImportOutcomeSchema.title: ImportOutcomeSchema
ImportOutcomeSchema.description: One successfully-imported playlist in the import response.

ImportSpotifyLikesRequest.title: ImportSpotifyLikesRequest
ImportSpotifyLikesRequest.description: Request body for triggering a Spotify likes import.

ImportSpotifyPlaylistsRequest.title: ImportSpotifyPlaylistsRequest
ImportSpotifyPlaylistsRequest.description:
Body for POST /connectors/spotify/playlists/import.

Each ID is a Spotify-native playlist ID (not a Mixd UUID). The whole
batch shares one ``sync_direction`` — per-playlist direction overrides
can be added later if a workflow demands it.

ImportSpotifyPlaylistsResponse.title: ImportSpotifyPlaylistsResponse
ImportSpotifyPlaylistsResponse.description: Grouped per-playlist outcomes so the UI can render a clear summary.

LastRunSchema.title: LastRunSchema
LastRunSchema.description: Lightweight last-run summary for the workflow list page.

LibraryTrackSchema.title: LibraryTrackSchema
LibraryTrackSchema.description: Track in library list views — lightweight with summary fields.

MatchMethodHealthSchema.title: MatchMethodHealthSchema
MatchMethodHealthSchema.description: Full match method health report response.

MatchReviewSchema.title: MatchReviewSchema
MatchReviewSchema.description: Single match review item for API responses.

MergeTrackRequest.title: MergeTrackRequest
MergeTrackRequest.description: Request body for merging a duplicate track into a winner.

MethodHealthStatSchema.title: MethodHealthStatSchema
MethodHealthStatSchema.description: Single match method + connector aggregation row.

OperationStartedResponse.title: OperationStartedResponse
OperationStartedResponse.description: Returned immediately when a long-running operation is launched.

PlaylistBriefSchema.title: PlaylistBriefSchema
PlaylistBriefSchema.description: Minimal playlist reference in track detail views.

PlaylistSummarySchema.description:
Compact playlist representation for list views.

Breaking change from v0.4.3: connector_links changed from list[str]
to list[ConnectorLinkBriefSchema] with sync direction and status.

RelinkMappingRequest.title: RelinkMappingRequest
RelinkMappingRequest.description: Request body for relinking a mapping to a different track.

ResolveReviewRequest.title: ResolveReviewRequest
ResolveReviewRequest.description: Request body for accepting or rejecting a review.

SpotifyPlaylistBrowseResponse.title: SpotifyPlaylistBrowseResponse
SpotifyPlaylistBrowseResponse.description:
Full payload for GET /connectors/spotify/playlists.

``from_cache=True`` means the response was served from DBConnectorPlaylist
without hitting Spotify; the refresh button in the UI sets
``force_refresh=true`` to force the cache miss.

SpotifyPlaylistBrowseSchema.title: SpotifyPlaylistBrowseSchema
SpotifyPlaylistBrowseSchema.description:
One playlist row in the Spotify browser dialog.

Mirrors ``SpotifyPlaylistView`` from the use case layer — the UI reads
this shape directly; the API wraps the list in ``SpotifyPlaylistBrowseResponse``.

SyncPreviewResponse.title: SyncPreviewResponse
SyncPreviewResponse.description:
Preview of what a sync operation would change (read-only).

When ``has_comparison_data`` is False, the link has never been synced
and no locally-cached external playlist exists for diffing.

SyncStartedResponse.title: SyncStartedResponse
SyncStartedResponse.description: Response for sync operations that run in the background.

TagCountSchema.title: TagCountSchema
TagCountSchema.description: Tag with its usage count, for autocomplete and tag browsers.

TrackDetailSchema.title: TrackDetailSchema
TrackDetailSchema.description: Full track detail with assembled metadata from multiple repositories.

TrackSummarySchema.title: TrackSummarySchema
TrackSummarySchema.description: Minimal track data for playlist entry listings.

UserSettingsPatch.title: UserSettingsPatch
UserSettingsPatch.description: Partial settings update — only include fields to change.
